# `api.shipments.get_global_accessorials`

> `GET /shipment/accessorials` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.shipments.get_global_accessorials() -> list[GlobalAccessorial]
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab shipments get_global_accessorials
```

``GET /shipment/accessorials``

## Response

Returns a list of `List[GlobalAccessorial]`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Accessorial ID |
| `name` | `Optional[str]` | no | Name |
| `category` | `Optional[str]` | no | Category grouping |
| `description` | `Optional[str]` | no | Accessorial description |
| `price` | `Optional[str]` | no | Price or price range |
| `options` | `Optional[list[AccessorialOption]]` | no | Accessorial options |
| `uniqueId` | `Optional[str]` | no | Unique identifier |
| `sourceAPIs` | `Optional[list[int]]` | no | Source API identifiers |
